title: potentilla campestris
intro: Potentilla campestris, also known as rough-leaved cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla campestris include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
